heroHeadline: Russia Officially Confirms 16 Cameroonian Soldiers Killed in Ukraine — First Acknowledgment of African Troop Casualties
heroSubtitle: Moscow's rare admission marks the first official Russian confirmation of African national casualties in the war, revealing the international scope of foreign fighter recruitment by Russian forces
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
